live_project.title: DevManiac Android
live_project.description: Native Android client for the DevManiac build-in-public network. Compose UI, offline-first feed cache, and journal publishing from your phone.
live_project.current_status: Wiring the project detail screen to the paginated comments endpoint

content: Day 18: comments endpoint is live in the app. Two-level threading was the tricky part — replies never nest past depth 1 on the backend, so I flattened the DTO instead of recursing.

live_project.title: Open LMS
live_project.description: A free, self-hostable learning management system aimed at community colleges that can't afford Canvas. Course authoring, gradebook, and SCORM import.
live_project.current_status: Gradebook CSV export shipped, now hardening the SCORM importer against malformed manifests

content: Open LMS demo instance is up on Fly.io. Postgres on a 1GB volume, Litestream backups to R2, and the whole thing costs under $6/month. Link in the project.

live_project.title: Rust Game Engine
live_project.description: A small 2D game engine in Rust focused on iteration speed: hot-reloadable game logic, sprite batching on wgpu, and a tiny ECS.
live_project.current_status: Sprite batcher renders 10k quads at 144fps, hot-reload survives struct layout changes now

content: Day 23: hot-reload finally survives struct layout changes. Serializing world state through a stable ABI boundary before swapping the dylib did the trick.

live_project.title: DevManiac Android
live_project.description: Native Android client for the DevManiac build-in-public network. Compose UI, offline-first feed cache, and journal publishing from your phone.
live_project.current_status: Wiring the project detail screen to the paginated comments endpoint

content: Day 12: swapped the hand-rolled feed pagination for Paging 3. Deleted 200 lines of cursor bookkeeping and the scroll jank on refresh is gone.

live_project.title: Open LMS
live_project.description: A free, self-hostable learning management system aimed at community colleges that can't afford Canvas. Course authoring, gradebook, and SCORM import.
live_project.current_status: Gradebook CSV export shipped, now hardening the SCORM importer against malformed manifests

content: Day 33: the SCORM importer now handles the three most common manifest quirks I found in real course exports. Wrote a fuzzer that mutates imsmanifest.xml and it caught two more panics.

live_project.title: DevManiac Android
live_project.description: Native Android client for the DevManiac build-in-public network. Compose UI, offline-first feed cache, and journal publishing from your phone.
live_project.current_status: Wiring the project detail screen to the paginated comments endpoint

content: Starting a new build: a native Android client for DevManiac itself. Kotlin + Compose, Retrofit against the existing FastAPI backend. Goal is feature parity with the mobile web feed in 6 weeks.

live_project.title: Rust Game Engine
live_project.description: A small 2D game engine in Rust focused on iteration speed: hot-reloadable game logic, sprite batching on wgpu, and a tiny ECS.
live_project.current_status: Sprite batcher renders 10k quads at 144fps, hot-reload survives struct layout changes now

content: New build: a 2D game engine in Rust where the whole point is iteration speed. If I can't change gameplay code and see it in under a second, the engine has failed.

live_project.title: Open LMS
live_project.description: A free, self-hostable learning management system aimed at community colleges that can't afford Canvas. Course authoring, gradebook, and SCORM import.
live_project.current_status: Gradebook CSV export shipped, now hardening the SCORM importer against malformed manifests

content: Open LMS crossed 500 GitHub stars this week. Two community college instructors reached out about piloting it in the fall semester — this is why it's open source.
